---
title: "Python Packages 5 : Linting"
author: "nshephard"
date: "2022-11-30"
categories: [code, analysis, python, packages, packaging, git, github, gitlab]
image: https://live.staticflickr.com/8170/7941683994_afac5a59f9_k.jpg
---

This is the fifth in a series of posts about writing Python Packages and covers linting.


# Links

* [black](https://github.com/psf/black)
* [flake8](https://github.com/pycqa/flake8)
* [mypy](http://www.mypy-lang.org/)
* [pylint](https://github.com/PyCQA/pylint)
